title: Unbeaten Iran will go down in history - Ghalenoei
summary: Iran's coach believes the team's unbeaten World Cup record will be historically significant despite facing disruptions before and during the tournament.
content: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei believes his side's unbeaten start to the World Cup will be talked about for years to come given the disruption they have faced before and during the tournament.

zh.title: 不败的伊朗将载入史册 - 盖莱诺埃
zh.summary: 伊朗教练认为，尽管球队在世界杯前和期间面临中断，但其不败记录将具有历史意义。

title: Saka trains with England squad before Ghana match
summary: England forward Bukayo Saka has resumed training with the squad, providing a fitness boost ahead of their second World Cup match against Ghana.
content: Bukayo Saka trains with the England squad to provide a fitness boost to Thomas Tuchel before their second World Cup match against Ghana.

zh.title: 萨卡在加纳比赛前与英格兰队一起训练
zh.summary: 英格兰前锋布卡约·萨卡已恢复与球队的训练，为他们即将进行的第二场世界杯对手加纳的比赛提供了体能上的提升。
